title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Daikin India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Daikin India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India International Enterprises:
Daikin India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
